comment.body:
So $20K+ per month isn’t enough? I apologized in advance for bringing it up, as this reaction was highly predictable. But would be nice to get some more education material to we can be more self sufficient. Right now we are just trading off information she gives us with no means to be able to produce it ourselves currently.

If it’s not replicable, then she should just claim this to be a quant investment service, not educational. No harm there. But some healthy accountability for previous promises made is not a bad thing and shouldn’t be ostracized.

comment.body:
Certainly, if it were up to me, I’d be in a classroom all day with my notebook, taking notes with Alma as my teacher. But sadly, that’s unrealistic(even if would be a dream for me, really). I believe the most—and only—effective approach is to work through everything we don’t understand until we finally grasp it. Personally, I love math, and throughout my studies I’ve always realized that wrestling with difficult concepts is the only way to truly learn them. While Alma can guide us, ultimately it’s our responsibility to understand the material. I made progress that I’ve never thought I could, hard work pays off. Let’s make this place a good env to share our understanding ( if I see basic question like what is speed, I won’t  answer simply because I’ve spent months to get these things in my own and it would not be respectful to my self). The level here is very high and our mission is to stay at that level, if it would have be easy we were not even talking about that.
So let’s discuss together what we don’t get I always said this!!!

comment.body:
Dude, chill… i’m guessing you’ve already digested all those educational posts she’s put out and leveled up your own skills, right? Didn’t you notice how many macroeconomic connections she’s laid out for us, how she explained the logic and the conclusions??? If you’re following her, then think along with her. Every single daily post of hers is basically an educational post on its own. You can find plenty of free info about greeks and all that elsewhere on the net anyway.
A bunch of us take her daily and weekly posts, go through the data ourselves, and try to piece together how alma drew her conclusions. You can learn a ton that way. And if you’ve noticed, the macro stuff is what really matters right now. She’s written some seriously epic macro analyses you won’t read anywhere else, and all of her forecasts have come true so far..every single one!!! So just chill, dude. You’re letting a lot of it fly right over your head
